data.content: Implementation review approved. Reviewed branch codex/fbb2-dynamic-overview-columns at e9afe376 against origin/main: six-file scoped diff, no whitespace issues, no invariants present. The implementation matches acceptance: empty columns are filtered, dynamic width helper and ResizeObserver hook drive auto columns, typography is one notch smaller, state pills are text-[9px] and whitespace-normal, and tests cover visible-group filtering plus width clamp behavior. Prior gates and browser metrics passed.
